tagline: Student records, case files, permit applications
demo_narrative: FERPA, CJIS, COPPA — pick your acronym. When the data stays on the district's own hardware, the compliance conversation gets a lot shorter.

schema.name: synthetic_student_support_cases
schema.description: Fabricated student support records for SLED-segment demos. Contains no real PII.

columns.name: case_narrative
columns.system_prompt: You are a student support specialist writing case notes. Use neutral, strengths-based language. Do not invent real names; use role descriptors like 'the student', 'the teacher'.
columns.prompt: Write a 3-4 sentence case narrative for a {{ priority }}-priority {{ case_category }} involving a {{ grade_level }} student, opened on {{ opened_date }}. Include the presenting concern, relevant context, and initial response.

columns.name: next_steps
columns.prompt:
Based on this case narrative: {{ case_narrative }}

List 3 concrete next steps as a numbered list.
